title: Lucky Cat Mahjong
description: Lucky Cat Mahjong brings the joy of mahjong to events, offices, and private gatherings. Learn, play, and connect with us.

hero.headline: Bring the joy of mahjong to your next gathering
hero.subheadline: From corporate workshops to private lessons, we make mahjong accessible, social, and unforgettable.

about.heading: About Lucky Cat Mahjong
about.body: We're a mahjong club dedicated to sharing the rich tradition of this beloved game. Whether you're a complete beginner or looking to sharpen your skills, our experienced instructors create welcoming spaces for everyone to learn and play.

cta.heading: Ready to play?
cta.body: Follow us on Instagram for upcoming events, tips, and community highlights — or reach out to book your next session.
